first_question.role_instruction: Generate valid candidate-grounded yes/no clarification proposals. The system uses the first valid runtime proposal. If additional question slots are included, keep them legal and compatible with the same candidate state.

random_question.role_instruction: Generate valid candidate-grounded yes/no clarification proposals. The system samples one valid runtime proposal uniformly. Do not output a final grasp decision unless the current candidate state contains exactly one plausible candidate.

vlm_best_question.role_instruction: Generate valid candidate-grounded yes/no clarification proposals and mark the proposal judged most useful by the VLM as Question id=1. Put alternate valid proposals in the remaining question slots. Do not output a final grasp decision unless the current candidate state contains exactly one plausible candidate.

proposed_efe.role_instruction: Generate valid candidate-grounded yes/no clarification proposals without receiving the EFE objective. The system computes the deployed expected-free-energy score externally and selects the lowest-scoring valid candidate partition. Do not output a final grasp decision unless the current candidate state contains exactly one plausible candidate.

vlm_direct.role_instruction: Use the same observation and candidate metadata but output a direct target choice rather than a yes/no clarification partition. Do not propose clarification questions. Target.name must be a candidate_id from Candidates.
